title: Touch 1: First-Contact Pager Generation
description: Walk through the complete Touch 1 first-contact pager workflow: from generation through the 3-gate HITL review (skeleton, lowfi, hifi), a lowfi refine demo, and the manual upload alternative.

steps.narration: Start by navigating to the Touch 1 First-Contact Pager page for the Meridian Dynamics deal. This is where you create a one-page overview document tailored to your prospect.
Notice the pager generation controls at the top. This is where the AI will build a personalized one-pager using your deal context and approved templates.
After clicking generate, the AI begins building your first-contact pager. The progress indicator shows the workflow is actively processing your deal data.
The skeleton gate is your first review checkpoint. The AI has extracted the core sections for your pager: Challenge, Proposed Solution, and Value Proposition. Review each section before approving.
Take a closer look at the outline content. Each section captures a key aspect of your prospect engagement. Make sure the framing matches your sales strategy before moving forward.
After approving the skeleton, the AI generates a full draft pager with expanded content for each section. This is the lowfi gate -- your second review checkpoint.
Here you can see the full draft content with headline, subheadline, and all four sections. The draft is ready for your feedback.
Let's try the refine feature. Click Request Changes to send feedback to the AI. It will regenerate the content while preserving the overall structure.
The AI has regenerated the draft based on your feedback. Notice the updated headline and stronger section content. The refine loop lets you iterate until the pager is exactly right.
Take a closer look at the refined content. The headline is more compelling and each section has been tightened with specific metrics and clearer calls to action.

After approving the refined draft, the AI generates the final polished pager with brand-compliant formatting, proper fonts, and accent colors. This is the hifi gate -- your last review before delivery.
The final pager looks great with full branding applied. Every element -- from fonts to colors -- follows your company's style guide automatically.
All done! Your first-contact pager has been saved to Google Drive. Click the link to open it directly or share it with your prospect.
There's also a manual upload option if you prefer to use your own document instead of generating one. Let's take a look at that alternative.
The manual upload area lets you drag and drop or browse for your own pager document. This is useful when you have a pre-existing document that just needs to be attached to the deal.
